checks.name: frameworkIncidentClaim

checks.name: reversionAndFinalGit
checks.evidence: Production and specification hashes returned to their pre-edit values. Final HEAD acf182a953763850023380d10711a42971ceaf05 and tree bf00a88f0e3236feaba9ccb8827c99fa6f87d285 equal the initial state; porcelain-v2 status is empty and pending-stub count is zero.

checks.name: privacyAndSanitization
checks.evidence: No private-key, AWS secret, GitHub-token, or bearer-token pattern was found. The raw trace contains machine-local home paths and is not copied or exposed as a training view; repository artifacts retain only relative project paths, hashes, and sanitized evidence.
